name: criticalPath
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/construction.js, registerLensAction('construction','criticalPath',...)) — reached only via /api/lens/run on key 'construction.criticalPath' (3-arg handler, virtualArtifact.data === input). DETERMINISTIC CPM forward/backward pass: earlyStart = max predecessor earlyFinish, projectDuration = max earlyFinish, lateFinish = min successor lateStart (or projectDuration), slack = lateStart − earlyStart, critical path = tasks with slack 0. duration = parseInt(t.duration) || 1 (so 'NaN'/absent → 1). Missing dependency ids resolve to earlyFinish 0 (no throw). Empty/absent/non-array tasks degrade graceful (guidance message). The GC-bench panel double-wraps; calcData() peels the layer so it computes identically. NOT macro-assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/construction-lens-macros.test.js.
